name: phil-test-repo
description: A simple Node.js project for testing Phil AI coding agent

scripts.serve: node -e "const http=require('http');const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const server=http.createServer((req,res)=>{const filePath=req.url==='/'?'src/demo.html':'src'+req.url;const extname=path.extname(filePath);let contentType='text/html';if(extname==='.js')contentType='text/javascript';if(extname==='.css')contentType='text/css';fs.readFile(filePath,(err,content)=>{if(err){res.writeHead(404);res.end('File not found');}else{res.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':contentType});res.end(content);}});});server.listen(3000,()=>console.log('Server running at http://localhost:3000'));"
